channel.title: Debian on ivomarino.com
channel.description: Recent content in Debian on ivomarino.com

item.title: Production Security Updates Without Downtime: Debian, FreeBSD, and OpenBSD
item.description: Security patches can’t wait, but unplanned reboots break production. The update runbook for Debian, FreeBSD, and OpenBSD — with real scripts, hold patterns, and a zero-downtime cluster update sequence.
